g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the kcp front-proxy in more detail')
sendPrompt('Explain kcp shards and how they host workspaces')
sendPrompt('How do I add more shards for scaling?')
sendPrompt('Explain kcp virtual workspaces and their endpoints')

svg.text: ✕ = shards never talk directly to each other
VW = virtual workspace server (runs inside each shard)
